reviews.comment:
Mucha espera tanto en esta YPF como en la otra de Sierra grande, pero entiendo es así porque son las últimas con precio de combustible subencionado.

(Translated by Google)
There's a long wait at both this YPF and the other one in Sierra Grande, but I understand that's because they're the last ones with subsidized fuel prices.

reviews.comment:
Estaba sobrepasada de gente, muchísima cola para cargar nafta. Los baños estaban bastante limpios pero mal ventilados al igual que el shop. Mucha gente, atención lenta Venden tambien artesanias y algunos recuerdos. Las estaciones del Aca se estan quedando bastante atras en cuanto a servicios y mantenimiento con respecto al resto. Tiene un lugar al aire libre con mesitas tipo de camping para comer.

(Translated by Google)
It was incredibly crowded, with a huge line to get gas. The restrooms were fairly clean but poorly ventilated, as was the convenience store. Lots of people, slow service. They also sell handicrafts and some souvenirs. ACA stations are falling quite behind in terms of service and maintenance compared to the rest. It has an outdoor area with picnic-style tables for eating.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdjlTRjZ3RRAB
